name: xbox-openxbl-mcp
title: Xbox Live (Community)
description: Xbox Live profiles, achievements, and presence via OpenXBL (xbl.io) API proxy — simple API key auth, no OAuth
author: community
tagline: Xbox profiles and achievements via simple API key

highlights.text: Profiles — gamertag, gamerscore, avatar, account age
Achievements — full unlock history and summaries
Presence — online status and current activity
Friends — friends list and user search
Simple auth — one API key, no OAuth dance

readme:
### What it does

Xbox Live (Community) connects your AI agent to Xbox Live data through the OpenXBL proxy at xbl.io. Look up any gamertag’s profile, browse achievement history, check who’s online, and search for players — all with a single API key.

This is the low-friction alternative to the full xboxlive-blade-mcp. No Azure app registration, no OAuth browser flow — just paste an API key and go.

### Trade-offs

OpenXBL is a community proxy, not the official Xbox API. Coverage is limited to read-only operations: profiles, achievements, presence, and friends. There’s no SmartGlass console control, no messaging, no game clips, and no Store catalog. If you need those, use xboxlive-blade-mcp instead.

### Safety model

All operations are read-only. The OpenXBL API does not expose any write endpoints, so there is no risk of accidental modifications to your Xbox account.

### Rate limits

Free tier includes limited daily requests. Paid plans ($3/month) provide higher throughput for automation workloads.

scenarios.label: Check a friend’s gaming activity
scenarios.body: Search for a gamertag, pull their profile and achievement summary, then check their online presence to see what they’re currently playing.

scenarios.label: Compare achievement progress
scenarios.body: Look up two gamertags, fetch achievement summaries for both, and compare gamerscore and completion rates across shared games.

setup.blurb: Xbox Live data via the OpenXBL proxy — no OAuth, just an API key. Covers profiles, achievements, and presence. For full Xbox Live access (SmartGlass, messaging, clips), use xboxlive-blade-mcp instead.
setup.help_text: Register at xbl.io, verify your Xbox account, and copy your API key from the dashboard. Free tier includes limited requests; paid plans scale.

notes: Community alternative to xboxlive-blade-mcp. Trades feature coverage for setup simplicity — API key auth via xbl.io proxy instead of OAuth2. Limited to read-only operations exposed by the OpenXBL API. No SmartGlass, messaging, clips, or Store catalog. Free tier has rate limits; paid plans ($3/mo) for higher throughput.
